benefits.description: Extra stamina during workout, faster completion of workouts

side_effects.description: Accidentally injected 20 IU instead of 2 IU due to mechanical issue with pen; reported no difference felt after accidental overdose

protocol_notes: OP is using pharmaceutical grade Pfizer HGH (Genotropin pen) obtained from pharmacy. Accidentally injected ~20 IU on one occasion due to mechanical issue with the pen. Normally dosing 2 IU. Plans to run 2 IU permanently for health benefits. Has been using for approximately 2 months. Asking how many days to skip after accidental overdose.
